16007.example_1: atha kho mucalindo nāgarājā sakabhavanā nikkhamitvā bhagavato kāyaṃ sattakkhattuṃ bhogehi parikkhipitvā uparimuddhani mahantaṃ phaṇaṃ karitvā aṭṭhāsi
16007.commentary: (UDa) uparimuddhani mahantaṃ phaṇaṃ vihaccā'ti bhagavato muddhappadesassa upari attano mahantaṃ phaṇaṃ pasāretvā. phaṇaṃ karitvā'ti'pi pāṭho, so ev'attho.

15003.example_1: [udā. 1 ādayo] tena samayena buddho bhagavā uruvelāyaṃ viharati najjā nerañjarāya tīre bodhirukkhamūle paṭham'ābhisambuddho.

36737.meaning_1: free from impurity; undefiled; pure; without fault
36737.example_1: yo brāhmaṇo bāhitapāpadhammo, nihuṃhuṅko nikkasāvo yat'atto, ved'antagū vusitabrahmacariyo, dhammena so brahmavādaṃ vadeyya, yass'ussadā n'atthi kuhiñci loke'ti.

8535.meaning_2: doctrine of eel wriggling; doctrine of equivocation
8535.example_1: etena ekaccasassatavādā satta saññīvādā ca dassitā. n'eva hoti na na hotī'ti iminā pana amarāvikkhepavādo dassito'ti veditabbaṃ.
8535.comment: it seems it is more lit meaning

70430.example_1: tena samayena buddho bhagavā verañjāyaṃ viharati naḷerupucimandamūle mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ pañcamattehi bhikkhusatehi.

36017.example_1: tena samayena buddho bhagavā verañjāyaṃ viharati naḷerupucimandamūle mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ pañcamattehi bhikkhusatehi.

70424.example_1: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdi. ekam'antaṃ nisinno kho verañjo brāhmaṇo bhagavantaṃ etadavoca
70424.commentary: (VINa) verañjāyaṃ jāto, verañjāyaṃ bhavo, verañjā vā assa nivāso'ti verañjo.

40779.example_1: paṭilātaṃ ukkhipati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. gilāno agilānasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa.
40779.commentary: (VINa) paṭilātaṃ ukkhipatī'ti dayhamānaṃ alātaṃ patitaṃ ukkhipati, puna yathāṭhāne ṭhapetī'ti attho. evaṃ avijjhātaṃ ukkhipitvā pakkhipantass'eva dukkaṭaṃ, vijjhātaṃ puna jālāpentassa pācittiyam'eva.

14106.meaning_1: raises up; lifts up; holds up
14106.example_1: brāhmaṇo evam'āha, ukkhipa laṅgiṃ, abhikkhaṇa, sumedha, satthaṃ ādāyā'ti. abhikkhaṇanto sumedho satthaṃ ādāya addasa uddhumāyikaṃ. uddhumāyikā, bhadante'ti.
14106.example_2: paṭilātaṃ ukkhipati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. gilāno agilānasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa.
14106.comment: brahmali :  If he puts back a burning piece of wood that has fallen off, he commits an offense of wrong conduct.

69272.example_1: anāpatti gilānassa, aññena kataṃ visibbeti, vītaccitaṅgāraṃ visibbeti, padīpe jotike jantāghare tathārūpappaccayā, āpadāsu, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

69800.example_1: anāpatti gilānassa, aññena kataṃ visibbeti, vītaccitaṅgāraṃ visibbeti, padīpe jotike jantāghare tathārūpappaccayā, āpadāsu, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

27932.example_1: asīti me, āvuso, vassāni pabbajitassa n'ābhijānāmi jantāghare nhāyitā
27932.example_2: anāpatti gilānassa, aññena kataṃ visibbeti, vītaccitaṅgāraṃ visibbeti, padīpe jotike jantāghare tathārūpappaccayā, āpadāsu, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
27932.commentary: (VINt) jantāghare'ti aggisālāyaṃ. sā hi jalati dibbati aggi etthā'ti jantā, janeti sarīrasedam'etthā'ti vā jantā, sā eva gharaṃ jantāgharan'ti vuccati, tasmiṃ.
27932.notes: The following progression of meanings seems likely: machine room > torture chamber > sauna

40248.example_1: abhikkama gahapati, abhikkama gahapati, abhikkamanaṃ te seyyo, no paṭikkamanan'ti.

40249.example_1: tato nīharitvā bhikkhūhi saddhiṃ saṃvibhajitabban'ti paṭikkamanaṃ nīharitvā saṃvibhajitabbaṃ.

24986.example_1: bhuttāvinā pavāritena āsanā vuṭṭhitena kataṃ hoti, alam'etaṃ sabban'ti avuttaṃ hoti, na gilān'ātirittaṃ hoti, etaṃ anatirittaṃ nāma.
24986.commentary: (VINa) gilān'ātirittan'ti ettha na kevalaṃ yaṃ gilānassa bhutt'āvasesaṃ hoti, taṃ gilān'ātirittaṃ, atha kho yaṃkiñci gilānaṃ uddissa ajja vā sve vā yadā vā icchati, tadā khādissatī'ti āhaṭaṃ, taṃ sabbaṃ gilān'ātirittan'ti veditabbaṃ.
24986.comment: it is the food left over after sick person finished eating - see Anāpatti— atirittaṁ kārāpetvābhuñjati, "atirittaṁ kārāpetvābhuñjissāmī"ti paṭiggaṇhāti, aññassatthāya haranto gacchati, gilānassa sesakaṁ bhuñjati

38156.example_2: nisīdi bhagavā paññatte āsane. nisajja pāde pakkhālesi.
38156.comment: as per our discussion we now add both for those which fit both in the context (my oppinion in those context abs meaning even fit more.

57828.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of sattāha
57828.meaning_1: for a week; for seven days; within seven days
57828.example_1: atha kho brahm'āyu brāhmaṇo satt'āhaṃ buddhappamukhaṃ bhikkhusaṅghaṃ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappesi sampavāresi.
57828.example_2: tassā dhammaṃ suṇitvāna, yathā maṃ anusāsi sā, satt'āhaṃ ekapallaṅkena, nisīdiṃ pītisukhasamappitā, aṭṭhamiyā pāde pasāresiṃ, tamokhandhaṃ padāliyā'ti.
57828.comment: meaning in Vib : satt'āhakālikaṃ sattahaṃ nidahitvā bhuñjati

41578.meaning_1: fine food; superior food; luxury food
41578.example_1: yāni kho pana tāni paṇītabhojanāni, seyyath'idaṃ, sappi, navanītaṃ, telaṃ, madhu, phāṇitaṃ, maccho, maṃsaṃ, khīraṃ, dadhi. yo pana bhikkhu evarūpāni paṇītabhojanāni agilāno attano atthāya viññāpetvā bhuñjeyya, pācittiyaṃ.
41578.example_2: agilāno nāma yassa vinā paṇītabhojanāni phāsu hoti.

68120.example_1: alaṃ, ānanda, mā soci mā paridevi nanu etaṃ, ānanda, mayā paṭikacc'eva akkhātaṃ sabbeh'eva piyehi manāpehi nānābhāvo vinābhāvo aññathābhāvo
68120.example_2: asatthagamanīyo nāma maggo na sakkā hoti vinā satthena gantuṃ.
68120.comment:
ex: agilāno nāma yassa vinā paṇītabhojanāni phāsu hoti.
VIN2.5.4.9 paṇītabhojanasikkhāpadaṃ

7058.meaning_1: perceiving (someone) as who has not refused more
7058.example_1: appavārite pavāritasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. appavārite vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. appavārite appavāritasaññī, anāpatti.

18687.meaning_1: connected with attachment; related to appropriation; concerned with acquisition; (comm) for which the performance of virtue is an acquisition, or they are things that have acquisitions as their purpose
18687.meaning_2: connected with material acquisitions and attachment; (according to commentaries) forming a basis for rebirth
18687.example_1: yāni kānici, bhikkhave, opadhikāni puññakiriyavatthūni sabbāni tāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā kalaṃ n'āgghanti soḷasiṃ. mettā'y'eva tāni cetovimutti adhiggahetvā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca.
18687.commentary: (ITIa) tattha upadhi vuccanti khandhā, upadhissa karaṇaṃ sīlaṃ etesaṃ, upadhippayojanāni vā opadhikāni.
18687.comment: I think comm meaning give quite a good clarity here, at least one of the options. Otherwise your meaning does not fit with any translation

12573.example_1: anupasampannaṃ uyyojeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. kalisāsanaṃ āropeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa.
12573.comment: "He attributes an angry/fault-finding teaching (to one who is fully ordained)." or "He brings up a fault-finding instruction." or "He inflicts an angry comment (upon the unordained person)." or "He raises a fault-finding statement."

3960.meaning_1: not included; not applied; not taken
3960.meaning_2: not used; with no mark used or added
3960.example_1: anādinne vematiko paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. anādinne ādinnasaññī paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa.

3961.example_1: anādinne anādinnasaññī paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. anādinne vematiko paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa.

11574.example_1: anādinne vematiko paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. anādinne ādinnasaññī paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa.

20068.meaning_1: place where the mark was made
20068.example_1: anāpatti, ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, kappo naṭṭho hoti, kappakat'okāso jiṇṇo hoti, kappakatena akappakataṃ saṃsibbitaṃ hoti, aggaḷe anuvāte paribhaṇḍe, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

20067.meaning_1: where the mark was made; marked with the dot
20067.meaning_2: (what is) made proper, made allowable; marked with the black dot
20067.example_1: anāpatti, ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, kappo naṭṭho hoti, kappakat'okāso jiṇṇo hoti, kappakatena akappakataṃ saṃsibbitaṃ hoti, aggaḷe anuvāte paribhaṇḍe, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

88.meaning_1: where the mark was not made; not marked with the dot
88.meaning_2: (what is) not made allowable; not marked
88.construction:
na > a + kappa + kata
na + kappakata
88.example_1: anāpatti, ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, kappo naṭṭho hoti, kappakat'okāso jiṇṇo hoti, kappakatena akappakataṃ saṃsibbitaṃ hoti, aggaḷe anuvāte paribhaṇḍe, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

61801.example_1: anāpatti, ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, kappo naṭṭho hoti, kappakat'okāso jiṇṇo hoti, kappakatena akappakataṃ saṃsibbitaṃ hoti, aggaḷe anuvāte paribhaṇḍe, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

636.meaning_1: patch; gusset; strip of cloth for strengthening a dress
636.example_1: anāpatti, ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, kappo naṭṭho hoti, kappakat'okāso jiṇṇo hoti, kappakatena akappakataṃ saṃsibbitaṃ hoti, aggaḷe anuvāte paribhaṇḍe, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

43779.example_1: anāpatti, ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, kappo naṭṭho hoti, kappakat'okāso jiṇṇo hoti, kappakatena akappakataṃ saṃsibbitaṃ hoti, aggaḷe anuvāte paribhaṇḍe, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

6784.construction: na > a + pati > paty > pacc + ud + √dhar > dhār + *aṇa
6784.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhussa vā bhikkhuniyā vā sikkhamānāya vā sāmaṇerassa vā sāmaṇeriyā vā sāmaṃ cīvaraṃ vikappetvā appaccuddhāraṇaṃ paribhuñjeyya, pācittiyan'ti.

6785.example_1: appaccuddhāraṇe vematiko paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. appaccuddhāraṇe appaccuddhāraṇasaññī paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa.

39516.example_1: paccuddhāraṇe vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. paccuddhāraṇe paccuddhāraṇasaññī, anāpatti.

35961.meaning_1: not aiming for amusement; not wanting some fun; not looking for a laugh; not for the sake of fun
35961.example_1: anāpatti nahas'ādhippāyo, dunnikkhittaṃ paṭisāmeti, dhammiṃ kathaṃ katvā dassāmī'ti paṭisāmeti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
35961.commentary: (VVt) nahasādhippāyassa phusato'ti has'ādhippāyaṃ vinā vandan'ādīsu pād'ādisarīr'āvayavena paraṃ phusantassa.

33599.example_1: anāpatti nahas'ādhippāyo, dunnikkhittaṃ paṭisāmeti, dhammiṃ kathaṃ katvā dassāmī'ti paṭisāmeti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

79414.example_1: atthi keci buddhassa bhagavato uccārapassāvaṃ nhāyanti vilimpanti ucchādenti peḷāya paṭisāmenti karaṇḍāya nikkhipanti āpaṇe pasārenti, tena ca gandhena gandhakaraṇīyaṃ karontī'ti?
79414.example_2: anāpatti nahas'ādhippāyo, dunnikkhittaṃ paṭisāmeti, dhammiṃ kathaṃ katvā dassāmī'ti paṭisāmeti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
